meta.title: SZL formula proof-harness corpus (honest local prototype)
meta.provenance: Curated from REAL estate sources this pass (no invented formulas): SZLHOLDINGS/canonical-formulas-v1 (code/python/formulas.py, 21 fns), a11oy packages/a11oy-knowledge/src/knowledge.json (23 puriq F1-F23 + 9 axioms + 4 theorems), lutar-lean PROVEN_FORMULAS.md (locked-8), lutar-lean Lutar/Thesis/TH_V18_* + Lutar/Thresholds/QuadraticCompletion.lean + Wave5/6, a11oy docs/ANCIENT_TEXTS_FORMULA_LINEAGE.md.

class_legend.DEFINITIONAL: true by construction; nothing to prove
class_legend.CONJECTURE: not falsifiable / open as stated (honest label, not an insult)

meta.doctrine: Lambda = Conjecture-1 is NEVER marked proven. CHECKED means: the stated algebra/units were machine-verified THIS PASS, NOT that the governance semantics or metaphysics are proven.

formulas.statement: Weighted geometric mean is positively homogeneous degree 1: Prod (c*x_i)^{w_i} = c * Prod x_i^{w_i} when sum(w_i)=1.
Geometric mean <= max axis (AM-GM corollary). 2-var: sqrt(a*b) <= (a+b)/2, with slack (sqrt(a)-sqrt(b))^2/2.
Singleton bound: min distance d <= n-k+1; RS(10,6) tolerates n-k=4 erasures, recoverable iff >=6 of 10 shards survive.
Euler characteristic of a convex polyhedron: V - E + F = 2 (checked on the Platonic solids).
formulas.reported_status: REPORTED PROVED (vault label); Euler arithmetic checkable

formulas.statement: Horus-Eye / Egyptian unit-fraction sum: 1/2+1/4+1/8+1/16+1/32+1/64 = 63/64.
Kraft inequality: for a binary prefix code with lengths {1,2,3,3}, sum 2^{-l_i} = 1 <= 1 (complete code equality).
Entropy budget additive & monotone over a region partition: s1 <= s1 + s2 for s2 >= 0 (NOT the full Bekenstein bound).
Additive superposition fragment: total coupling over k phases = sum of per-phase couplings (linear part only; NOT nonlinear Kuramoto sync).
Completing the square: x^2 + b*x + c = (x + b/2)^2 + (c - b^2/4).
Cauchy-Schwarz (n=2) via Lagrange identity: (a1*b1+a2*b2)^2 = (a1^2+a2^2)(b1^2+b2^2) - (a1*b2-a2*b1)^2, so LHS <= product.
Madhava-Leibniz series: atan(x) = sum_{m>=0} (-1)^m x^(2m+1)/(2m+1); matches sympy Taylor series of atan.
Fisher-Rao distance d(p,q) = 2*arccos(sum sqrt(p_i q_i)); self-distance d(p,p) = 2*arccos(1) = 0 when sum p_i = 1.
BFT arithmetic: with f=1 faulty, n=3f+1=4 nodes and quorum 2f+1=3 (the 3-of-4 Khipu quorum). NOTE: BFT *safety/liveness* itself is Conjecture-2/3, not proven.
Shor code [[9,1,3]]: distance d=3 corrects t=floor((d-1)/2)=1 error; satisfies classical Singleton n-k+1=9 >= d.
Pinsker: KL(p||q) >= 2*TV(p,q)^2. Machine-checked by numeric sampling over random 2-point distributions (NOT a symbolic proof).
Bekenstein bound S = 2*pi*R*E/(hbar*c): the group R*E/(hbar*c) must be dimensionless.
formulas.reported_status: dimensional helper; TH6 DPI form PROVEN

formulas.statement: Landauer limit E = k_B * T * ln2: energy per irreversible bit erasure has units of energy (Joules).
Trust axes x_i in [0,1] are dimensionless; Lambda (weighted geo-mean of dimensionless axes) is dimensionless.
rho-closure rate = 100% (8000/8000 paired calls, ouroboros v6.3.0).
Bekenstein indicator fire rate = 49.5% (thesis.md 4.5).
Receipt build p50 = 11.5 us (62764 ops/s), p99 = 50.7 us; verify p50 = 1e6/ops_per_sec.
Model accuracy / khipu-verifiability / HUKLLA refusal, scored against 100 public-source Q&A items.
System defined as tuple S = <R, A, E, Lambda, rho, W> over eight regions.
A receipt-bound edge e in E is a tuple (a_src, r_src, r_dst, ...).
DSSE envelope structure with PAE binding; signature is an HONEST PLACEHOLDER (Sigstore not wired).
Canonical 13-axis trust vector: 2 sacred (floor 0.95) + 7 structural (0.90) + 4 introspection (0.90).

Conjecture 1: Lambda (weighted geo-mean w/ Egyptian weights) is the UNIQUE aggregator satisfying A1-A5. Unconditional uniqueness is machine-checked FALSE (maxAgg counterexample); conditional Theorem U is proven.
Khipu BFT 3-of-4 safety: no two conflicting decisions both reach quorum under <=f faults.
Khipu BFT liveness: every submitted action eventually reaches a quorum decision.
'Code of reality' / ancient-text inspiration (Emerald Tablet correspondence, Dead Sea Scrolls calendrics) as substrate metaphor.
